NAME

debug Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Files


file atomic.c
Debug formatting and state tracking for atomic operations. file backtrace.c
📍 Backtrace capture, symbolization, and formatting implementation file memory.c
🧠 Memory debugging implementation for ascii-chat debug builds file mutex.c
Per-thread mutex lock stack for deadlock detection. file named.c
Named object registry for debugging. file sync.c
🔒 Synchronization primitive debugging with dynamic state inspection
